item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-10580 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-10580 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass leading to Administrator Account Takeover in all versions up to and including 1.9.4. This is due to a logic conflation in HippooPermissions::get_user_permissions(), which returns the same null sentinel for both administrators and unauthenticated visitors — a value that HippooPermissions::has_role_access() unconditionally...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10580

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-5415 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-5415 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The WP Captcha PRO (the premium version of the Advanced Google reCAPTCHA plugin, both have the same slug) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass in all versions up to, and including, 5.38. This is due to the ajax_run_tool() AJAX handler relying solely on a nonce check (check_ajax_referer) for security without performing any capability check, combined with the create_temporary_link tool allowing t...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5415

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Critical Everest Forms Pro flaw exploited to take over WordPress sites - BleepingComputer
item.description:
💣 Critical Everest Forms Pro flaw exploited to take over WordPress sites - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Silent Ransom Group targets law firms with fake IT support calls
item.description:
📰 Silent Ransom Group targets law firms with fake IT support calls
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Silent Ransom Group extortion gang is actively targeting U.S. law firms and professional services organizations in social engineering attacks that often lead to data theft within hours of initial contact, according to a new report by cybersecurity firm Mandiant.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/silent-ransom-group-targets-law-firms-with-fake-it-support-calls/
